prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约6240名→7084名→9891名→8243名→7935名，整体呈先降后升走势；2023年出现较大后移后，近两年连续回升，2025年基准约79 35名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划2021年92人、2022年98人、2023年97人、2024年104人、2025年107人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划85人，较20 25年减少22人，缩招约20.6%，竞争明显加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第31名，近年排名稳定在29–32名区间，属中上 游985；2026年声誉数据中未见湖南大学明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第16（高热），短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度升温。历史投档异常记录中未见 该校断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，化学A、机械工程A、工商管理A、土木工程A-、计算机科学与技术A-、电气工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、应用经济学A-等8个 学科达A-/A级，工科与管理学科实力均衡。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与湖南大学优势学科高度契合；辽宁省2026年考 生总数约20万（2025年约19.97万），基本持平，分科估算物理类约14.36万，竞争格局稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7935名、2026 年大幅缩招约20.6%导致竞争加剧、学校声誉良好且抖音热度高吸引更多关注、优势学科集中于热门工科等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年前移；预测最低位次约6926名 ，区间6426–7426名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6240 → 7084 → 9891 → 8243 → 7935, showing an overall trend of first decreasing then increasing; after a significant drop in 2023, it has rebounded for two consecutive years, with a baseline of about 7935 in 2025; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province was 92 in 2021, 98 in 2022, 97 in 2023, 104 in 2024, and 107 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 85, a decrease of 22 from 2025, a reduction of about 20.6%, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 31st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 29–32 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities; no significant negative public opinion about Hunan University was found in the 2026 reputation data; ranked 16th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications. No signs of a gap in historical admission anomalies; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 8 disciplines including Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Civil Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, and Applied Economics A- reached A-/A level, with balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with Hunan University's advantageous disciplines; the total number of candidates in Liaoning Province in 2026 is about 200,000 (approximately 199,700 in 2025), basically flat, with an estimated 143,600 in the Physics Category, maintaining a stable competitive landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7935, the significant enrollment reduction of about 20.6% in 2026 leading to intensified competition, the good school reputation and high Douyin popularity attracting more attention, and the advantageous disciplines concentrated in popular engineering fields, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6926, with a range of 6426–7426.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 6926, range 6426–7426. For rankings near the upper limit of the range (7426), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 with Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings near the lower limit (6426), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information. Hunan University has outstanding engineering strengths, with high discipline evaluations in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering, and sustained social popularity, making it worth prioritizing.

The enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province for History Category was 16 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 18 in 2025, overall stable in the 16–19 range; the 2026 plan is 43, an increase of 25 from 2025, a substantial expansion of about 138.9%, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Chinese University Ranking 2026 approximately 31st, with recent rankings stable in the 29–32 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities; no significant negative public opinion about Hunan University in 2026 reputation data; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 16th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications. No signs of admission breaks in historical abnormal records; strong disciplines in Applied Economics A-, Business Administration A, etc., highly matching History Category majors (Finance, Economics, Accounting, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and other liberal arts majors are socially popular and recommended; the total number of candidates in Liaoning Province in 2026 is about 200,000, with an estimated 56,400 in History Category, basically flat with 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1108, the substantial expansion of about 138.9% in 2026 leading to significantly eased competition, good university reputation and high Douyin heat attracting more attention, and high matching between advantageous disciplines and enrollment majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move back compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking about 2011, range 1709–2313.
